title: puccinellia hackeliana subsp. humilis
intro: Puccinellia hackeliana subsp. humilis, also known as Little Salt Grass, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the grass family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Puccinellia hackeliana subsp. humilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various health issues, including skin infections and minor wounds.
